name: Irish Potato Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and coarsely chop them.
2. Make a roux by heating oil in a pan and cooking the chopped onion until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the chopped bacon (if desired) and cook for another minute or two.
4. Add the coarsely chopped potatoes to the pan and mix well.
5. Pour boiling water over the potatoes, adding salt and pepper to taste. Stir gently.
6. Allow the mixture to simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 5 minutes.
